productDisplayName: Salomon Men Exit 2 Aero Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Exit 2 Aero from salomon is a breathable pair with a leather and mesh upper, and is an ultra-hiking shoe. The sleek profile on this shoe combined with its lightness make it great value for money. It's also great for travel and trekking the trails in warm weather. This is a good quality low hiking shoe with good stability and traction. Product Details Anti-debris mesh to avoid debris being trapped between your foot and footbed Split-suede leather reinforcement provides support and stability with heel foam Abrasion resistant textile lining Quick-lacing system Sensifit upper construction connects to the lace-points for a secure, wrapped Fit Die-cut EVA sockliner for instep comfort Advanced Chassis between the midsole and outsole maximizes energy control and push-through performance Non-marking rubber Conta Grip outsole with all-terrain tread (Delivering optimal traction on varied surfaces, Salomon's Contagrip outsoles use the ideal combination of specialized rubbers for each specific use) TPU toe cap Material and Care Leather, mesh Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight
